creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I'm experiencing this one too with anything that depends on curl and uses pkgconf to detect it.

It caused by a recent upstream change in curl [1]

We need to fix curl configure script, but I don't have a patch ready right away.


[1] https://github.com/curl/curl/commit/d511ec8b0a56b2a99226fe556abe9f815153c648#diff-49473dca262eeab3b4a43002adb08b4db31020d190caaad1594b47f1d5daa810
